title: Manifest
description:
Complete manifest definition for a static dataset.

A manifest defines one or more tables backed by static data files.
Table names are explicit map keys.

tables.description: Table definitions mapped by table name.

ArrowSchema.description:
Arrow schema representation for serialization.

Contains an ordered list of fields that define the structure of a table.

fields.description: Ordered list of fields in the schema

Field.description:
Arrow field definition with name, type, and nullability.

Represents a single column in a table schema.

nullable.description: Whether the field can contain null values

type.description: Arrow data type of the field

FilePath.description: Relative file path with forward slashes, no traversal (..), and a file extension

Table.description:
Table definition within a static dataset.

Defines a table backed by a static data file with its format
and Arrow schema.

path.description: Path to the data file relative to the provider's object store root.

sorted_by.description:
Column names the data file is pre-sorted by.

Declaring sort order enables the query engine to skip redundant sorts.
Defaults to empty (no ordering guarantees).

has_header.description: Whether the CSV file includes a header row.

TableSchema.description:
Schema definition for a table.

Wraps an Arrow schema with field definitions including names, types, and nullability.
